message: Hi! You look a bit lost. Are you okay?
Oh, I'm fine. Just here for a quick visit. How about you?
I'm on my way to the art room. We're working on a mural project today. It's going to be amazing!
That sounds really cool! I'd love to see it sometime.

actions.title: Enter the high school building
actions.description: You can click or select doors to move between rooms.
